name: Fischer Frey
description:
♥ Fischer Frey ♥

"Tutoring him on better Quidditch tactics."

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► It is your Seventh Year at Hogwarts; and Madam Hooch has asked you to tutor Fischer in regards to some tactics in Quidditch— reluctantly so, you agreed, and now— waiting in the library for the older Frey twin to show up, you are fiddling with the cover of 'Quidditch Throughout the Ages'...
creator: Lonely_Magpie
